title: Dead Lettering, Poison Messages, Delivery Limits, and Parking · Changed-Schema Lab
summary: An independent integration team receives different traffic, tenant, topology, schema, and failure constraints and transfers dead lettering, poison messages, delivery limits, and parking into a new dead-letter, poison, and remediation topology. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of dead-letter, poison, and remediation topology with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evi…
objectives: Trace nack or reject without requeue, expiry, length overflow, and quorum delivery-limit dead lettering through exchange and routing policy.
Configure dead lettering through mutable policy where possible and verify source read, target write, exchange existence, binding, and route permissions.
Detect and bound dead-letter cycles using history, stable identity, attempt policy, route analysis, and a terminal parking destination.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Dead Letter Trigger Route
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab messaging team handles case 1585 in a consumer fleet under a shared dependency outage. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to route exhausted poison messages through a bound, owned, and retained remediation path; separate browser evidence from disposable live-broker proof; then make the broker confirmation disappear after the message may have committed. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Dead Letter Trigger Route.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for trace nack or reject without requeue, expiry, length overflow, and quorum delivery-limit dead lettering through exchange and routing policy. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Dead Letter Trigger Route, keep Dead Letter Trigger Route connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Give parked messages bounded retention, searchable redacted evidence, owner, repair, replay authorization, duplicate safety, and closure criteria.
